title: Sr Engineer, IT, AI Enablement
company_focus: Memory and storage solutions for data centers and computing
description:
Our vision is to transform how the world uses information to
enrich life for all .  Micron Technology is a world leader
in innovating memory and storage solutions that accelerate
the transformation of information into intelligence,
inspiring the world to learn, communicate and advance faster
than ever. Join Micron's AI Enablement team and help
accelerate enterprise-wide AI adoption. This role is
designed for engineers passionate about applying AI to real-
world business challenges. You will work on rapid
prototyping, automation, and integration of AI solutions
that enhance productivity and innovation across diverse
business areas. Key Responsibilities:

- AI Solution Development: Build and deploy AI-driven tools
  and workflows using platforms like Copilot Studio, UiPath,
  and other automation frameworks.

- Integration & Enablement: Connect AI agents with enterprise
  systems (e.g., SharePoint, M365), external APIs, knowledge
  bases, and ensure seamless interoperability.

- Process Automation: Identify repetitive tasks and design
  intelligent automation solutions to improve efficiency.

- Collaboration & Training: Partner with cross-functional
  teams to enable AI literacy, create best-practice
  documentation, and support internal training sessions.

- Governance & Compliance: Collaborate with cybersecurity
  teams to enforce data protection, threat modeling and
  ensure all AI solutions adhere to security, ethical, and
  compliance standards.

- Security & Identity Integration

- Ensure secure agent interactions using encryption,
  authentication, and authorization mechanisms.

- Integrate agents with identity platforms (e.g., OAuth2,
  OIDC, SAML, Entra ID, AD FS, etc.) for secure access
  control.

- Continuous Improvement: Collect feedback, iterate solutions,
  and contribute to a culture of innovation and scalability.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

- Bachelor's or master's degree in computer science, AI,
  Machine Learning, Data Science or related field.

- Professionals with a minimum of 5 years of experience in
  software development, including at least 2 years
  specializing in AI/ML engineering.

- Strong understanding of AI concepts, machine learning
  pipelines, and automation tools.

- Hands-on experience or coursework in Copilot Studio, UiPath,
  and SharePoint.

- Knowledge with cloud AI platforms: Azure AI Foundry, AWS
  Bedrock, and/or Google Vertex AI.

- Knowledge with scalable context management solutions
  including retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), semantic
  chunking, and memory persistence for long-horizon tasks

- Implement multi-agent workflows for complex tasks such as
  decision-making, negotiation, and collaborative problem-
  solving.

- Ability to design, implement, and manage context-aware
  systems that leverage Model Context Protocol (MCP) to
  maintain continuity across user interactions, including
  prompt engineering, memory management, and context window
  optimization for large language models.

- Familiarity with cloud platforms, API integrations, and data
  quality validation.

- Familiarity with agent orchestration frameworks and multi-
  agent systems using A2A (Agent to Agent).

- Knowledge of common development languages

- .Net, C#, Python, Java, API development, SQL, PowerShell,
  Unix shell scripting

- Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work in
  fast-paced, agile environments.

- Strong communication skills for cross-team collaboration.

Preferred Attributes:

- Exposure to generative AI, prompt engineering, or agent-
  based systems.

- Interest in AI governance, security, and ethical frameworks.

- Ability to adapt quickly and deliver "quick wins" while
  maintaining enterprise standards.

Why Join Us?

- Work on cutting-edge AI initiatives that transform
  enterprise operations.

- Collaborate with global teams and gain hands-on experience
  in AI enablement.

- Be part of a program that values creativity, agility, and
  continuous learning.

About Micron Technology, Inc. We are an industry leader in
innovative memory and storage solutions transforming how the
world uses information to enrich life for all . With a
relentless focus on our customers, technology leadership,
and manufacturing and operational excellence, Micron
delivers a rich portfolio of high-performance DRAM, NAND,
and NOR memory and storage products through our Micron® and
Crucial® brands. Every day, the innovations that our people
create fuel the data economy, enabling advances in
artificial intelligence and 5G applications that unleash
opportunities - from the data center to the intelligent edge
and across the client and mobile user experience. To learn
more, please visit micron.com/careers All qualified
applicants will receive consideration for employment without
regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation,
gender identity, national origin, veteran or disability
status. To request assistance with the application process
and/or for reasonable accommodations, please contact
hrsupport_india@micron.com Micron Prohibits the use of child
labor and complies with all applicable laws, rules,
regulations, and other international and industry labor
standards. Micron does not charge candidates any recruitment
fees or unlawfully collect any other payment from candidates
as consideration for their employment with Micron. AI alert:
Candidates are encouraged to use AI tools to enhance their
resume and/or application materials. However, all
information provided must be accurate and reflect the
candidate's true skills and experiences. Misuse of AI to
fabricate or misrepresent qualifications will result in
immediate disqualification. Fraud alert: Micron advises job
seekers to be cautious of unsolicited job offers and to
verify the authenticity of any communication claiming to be
from Micron by checking the official Micron careers website
in the About Micron Technology, Inc.
responsibilities: Build and deploy AI-driven tools and workflows using Copilot Studio, UiPath, and automation frameworks
Connect AI agents with enterprise systems (SharePoint, M365), external APIs, and knowledge bases
Design intelligent automation solutions to improve efficiency for repetitive tasks
Implement multi-agent workflows for complex tasks like decision-making and collaborative problem-solving
Design and manage context-aware systems using RAG, semantic chunking, and memory persistence
Integrate agents with identity platforms (OAuth2, OIDC, SAML, Entra ID) for secure access control

use_cases: Enterprise AI adoption and enablement across business functions
Process automation for repetitive enterprise tasks
Knowledge retrieval and management with RAG systems
Secure AI agent integration with enterprise identity systems
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building and deploying AI agents,
implementing RAG systems, multi-agent workflows, and prompt
engineering. The engineer directly works ON AI systems
including Copilot Studio and agent orchestration, not just
supporting infrastructure.
